positive: A majestic, stylized woodland creature silhouette, specifically a stylized wolf howling to a full moon, rendered in intricate line art with stark black and white contrast. The wolf's form should be dynamic and centered, against a minimal, starry forest backdrop. The composition must be highly printable and suitable for repeating patterns or singular graphic tees, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and a gothic, enchanted aesthetic. Emphasize negative space and dramatic contrast, using only deep black lines on a white background. Vector art style, high detail, graphic novel illustration, clean edges, tattoo flash style, symmetrical balance, midnight blue and silver accent tones.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, low resolution, cropped, gradient, solid color fill, cartoon, photorealistic, noisy
